query:
WITH claimed AS (
               SELECT user_id, opk_id FROM one_time_prekeys
               WHERE user_id = $1
               ORDER BY opk_id
               FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
               LIMIT 1
           )
           DELETE FROM one_time_prekeys o
           USING claimed c
           WHERE o.user_id = c.user_id AND o.opk_id = c.opk_id
           RETURNING o.opk_id, o.opk_x25519_pub
